business_ideas.idea: Group buying model for Shopify checkout (Pinduo Duo for US)
Vertical software for specific industries (golf, healthcare, transit)
Zoom video setup and lighting e-commerce

predictions.text: Churches will permanently shift to livestream model for services
Home fitness will capture permanent share from traditional gym industry
Outdoor recreation and RV industry will see sustained surge
Drive-through services will become standard across multiple categories
Second-order effects of pandemic will create major business opportunities
